gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用错位的语音留言，串起一场跨越生死的浪漫奇遇，笑中带泪。
gems.whyWatchEn: A wrong-number voicemail sparks a long-distance romance that bridges grief and laughter in this unexpectedly heartfelt comedy.
gems.audience: 喜欢《真爱至上》式温暖笑泪、不介意奇幻设定的观众
gems.audienceEn: Fans of warm romantic comedies like 'Love Actually' who enjoy a touch of serendipitous fantasy.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 玩具总动员系列大胆拥抱数字时代，新老角色碰撞出关于陪伴的深刻寓言。
gems.whyWatchEn: Toy Story 5 bravely tackles the digital age, asking what 'play' means when screens replace hands—a poignant, inventive sequel.
gems.audience: 伴随玩具总动员长大的成年人、家有幼童的父母
gems.audienceEn: Adults who grew up with Toy Story and parents of young children navigating screen time.
